attrs.abstract:
The ESA Climate Change Initiative Aerosol project has produced a number of global aerosol Essential Climate Variable (ECV) products from a set of European satellite instruments with different characteristics.   This dataset comprises Level 3 daily and monthly gridded aerosol products from the AATSR instrument on ENVISAT, derived using the ORAC algorithm, version 4.01. Both daily and monthly gridded products are available

For further details about these data products please see the linked documentation.
attrs.history: 20161101T040758Z - Product generated at STFC RAL Space. AATSR L1b ver. 6.05
attrs.project: Climate Change Initiative - European Space Agency
attrs.title: ESA Aerosol Climate Change Initiative (Aerosol_cci): Level 3 aerosol products from AATSR (ORAC algorithm), Version 4.01
